# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service
        image: my-service-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: my-service

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  port: 8080
  protocol: http

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespace: my-namespace
        service: my-service
    to:
    - destination:
        namespace: my-namespace
        service: my-service
    when:
    - key: request.header[Authorization]
      values: ["Bearer *"]
